comparisonPolicy.scope: Exactly the 6 FOR-426 partial pixels whose CPU coverage alpha is 160/255 and WGSL rawPathCoverage is 96/255.
comparisonPolicy.cpuMaskSource: real scanFillPath execution: SkScanFillPathSubsampleTrace records selected pixels inside SkBitmapDevice.scanFillPath.addSpanCoverage while BoundedStrokeCapJoinCoverageMaskGM renders.
comparisonPolicy.cpuMaskSamplingRule: For each traced addSpanCoverage call, the trace marks the 4x4 subsample cells whose x-center lies inside the clipped CPU span for that subrow.
comparisonPolicy.wgslMaskSource: m60_f16_subsample_mask_4x4 captured from sample_covered in the shader-return-storage-zero-cause diagnostic.

partialPixels.classificationReason: The CPU scanFillPath span counter reports 10/16 coverage, but the traced 4x4 center mask matches the WGSL 6/16 mask.
